02 / 07
About

Builder.

Third-year B.E. (AI & DS) student and serial builder — 3+ years shipping production software that real people use every day.

Co-founded MediAssist AI, funded ₹2L by the Government of Karnataka NAIN 2.0 program. Shipped TripOnBuddy with real live users. Won 8 hackathon competitions including GDG and NASA SpaceApps 1st place.

Deep experience in Agentic AI, RAG pipelines, and MCP. Building AI-native products at the intersection of LLMs, blockchain, and mobile — pushing the envelope of what software can do.

GitHub ↗LinkedIn ↗HuggingFace ↗

Journey

How I got here.

2022

First Line of Code

Picked up Python and HTML/CSS out of curiosity. Built first projects. Realized software was something I could obsess over.

Picked up Python and HTML/CSS out of curiosity. Built first projects. Realized software was something I could obsess over.

2022
2023

First Hackathon Win

Entered first competition and won. Enrolled in B.E. AI & Data Science at SGBIT. Started shipping real React + Node apps.

2023
2023

First Hackathon Win

Entered first competition and won. Enrolled in B.E. AI & Data Science at SGBIT. Started shipping real React + Node apps.

2024

Government Funded

Co-founded MediAssist AI and received ₹2L NAIN 2.0 grant from Govt. of Karnataka. Interned at IIT Bombay — India's premier tech institute.
